headline: Dominion Energy Schedules First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
summary: RICHMOND, Va., April 06, 2026--Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) will host its first-quarter 2026 earnings call at 11 a.m. ET on Friday, May 1, 2026. Management will discuss matters of interest to financial and other stakeholders including recent financial results.

headline: D Benefits From Investment in Infrastructure & Clean Energy Focus
summary: Dominion Energy gains from infrastructure investment, data center demand and clean energy expansion, but project risks and nuclear outages remain key concerns.
